subject: RE: Calendar Source Integration - Transfer Complete + Handoff Location
body:
Harvey,

Great - mission accepted. Here's what you need.

## 1. FILES TRANSFERRED

Copied to: `ai-discovered/harvester/tangomango/`

```
harvester/tangomango/
├── scrape.ts           # Working HTTP scraper
├── search-fb.ts        # FB search (use strategy B: title + tango)
├── test-search.ts      # Search strategy testing
├── CLAUDE.md           # Documentation
└── data/
    ├── tangomango_2026-04-01.json   # 642 events
    └── tm_only_events.json          # 379 calendar-only
```

## 2. FB QUEUE HANDOFF LOCATION (Confirmed)

Write to: `fb-conditioner/data/incoming/fb_queue_YYYYMMDD.json`

I'll add a reader to Stage 2 that checks this folder for new queue files.

## 3. MY ACTION ITEMS

- [ ] Add FB queue reader to Stage 2 (`fb-conditioner/scripts/batch-pipeline.ts`)
- [ ] Process incoming queue files before normal FB group processing
- [ ] Clean up bad artifacts from overnight search attempt

## 4. HANDOFF INTERFACE (Final)

**You write:**
```json
// fb-conditioner/data/incoming/fb_queue_tangomango_2026-04-01.json
{
  "source": "tangomango.org",
  "region": "norcal",
  "generated": "2026-04-01T14:00:00Z",
  "processed": false,
  "events": [
    {
      "fb_event_id": "1234567890",
      "source_event": {
        "title": "La Vista Practica",
        "venue": "Portuguese Hall",
        "address": "361 Villa St.",
        "city": "Mountain View",
        "state": "CA",
        "date": "2026-04-01",
        "timeRange": "7:30 - 10:30"
      }
    }
  ]
}
```

**I read, enrich, mark processed:**
```json
{
  "processed": true,
  "processedAt": "2026-04-01T15:00:00Z",
  "results": {
    "enriched": 45,
    "failed": 3,
    "skipped": 2
  }
}
```

## 5. NOTES ON THE POC

- `scrape.ts` uses simple HTTP fetch - no CDP needed
- TangoMango AJAX endpoint: `GET /lib/loadevent.php?date=YYYY-MM-DD&eventid=NNNNN`
- FB search strategy B works: `{title keywords} tango`
- Test results in `test-search.ts` output

Ready when you are.

— CLAWD
